sources.name: NCBI GenBank (nuccore)
sources.license: GenBank/NCBI sequence data carries no copyright restrictions on the sequence facts. See https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/home/about/policies/

method: Each sequence is the substring of a fetched GenBank record at the coordinates of a feature whose type and /note match the target (method A, coordinate extraction). complement() locations are reverse-complemented. Some entries additionally carry a cross-confirmation (matchedInAccession) recording a second fetched record in which the extracted sequence was found verbatim. No sequence is written, completed, or recalled from memory.

entries.name: ColE1 / pUC (pMB1/pBR322) origin of replication
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: High-copy-number ColE1/pMB1/pBR322/pUC replication origin, annotated as a clean rep_origin range in a SnapGene-style synthetic-construct record (PX994934). This is the single shared origin region of the pUC, pBR322, pMB1 and ColE1 plasmid family; pBR322 and pMB1 are NOT stored as separate sequences because they ARE this same element. Extracted feature: rep_origin; record /note: "high-copy-number ColE1/pMB1/pBR322/pUC origin of replication; pUC_ori".

entries.name: p15A origin of replication
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: p15A (medium-copy) replication origin, annotated as a clean rep_origin range in a synthetic-construct record (PZ005984, lacI_IA9_Template). Extracted feature: rep_origin; record /note: "p15a origin".

entries.name: pSC101 origin of replication
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: pSC101 (low-copy) replication origin, annotated as an explicit coordinate range (misc_feature 'pSC101 ori') in a synthetic-construct record (PV807101, pHY702). Extracted feature: misc_feature; record /note: "pSC101 ori".

entries.name: SV40 origin of replication (auxiliary region)
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.license: Public domain sequence facts (GenBank/NCBI); record is freely redistributable.
entries.note: SV40 origin auxiliary region (adjacent to the core origin), in the primary SV40 genome record (J02400). Extracted feature: rep_origin; record /note: "replication origin auxiliary region; 0.67 [89]".

entries.name: SV40 origin of replication (core region)
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.license: Public domain sequence facts (GenBank/NCBI); record is freely redistributable.
entries.note: SV40 core origin of replication; origin-spanning feature across the circular junction in the primary SV40 genome record (J02400). Extracted feature: rep_origin; record /note: "replication origin core region; 0.67 [89]".

entries.name: CMV promoter (human cytomegalovirus immediate-early)
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: CMV immediate-early promoter, annotated as a clean range in a GenBank expression-vector record (pcDNA3.1 derivative). Extracted feature: regulatory; record /note: "CMV promoter".

entries.name: lac promoter (E. coli lac operon promoter)
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: E. coli lac operon promoter, annotated as a clean range in a SnapGene-style synthetic-construct record (PX994934). Extracted feature: regulatory; record /note: "promoter for the E. coli lac operon; lac promoter".

entries.name: SP6 promoter (for SP6 RNA polymerase)
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: Promoter for SP6 RNA polymerase, annotated as a clean range in a cloning-vector record (LR588434, AbVec2.1-mIglc2). Extracted feature: regulatory; record /note: "SP6 promoter".

entries.name: T3 promoter (for T3 RNA polymerase)
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: Promoter for T3 RNA polymerase, from the bacteriophage T3 gene 1 (RNA polymerase) record (X02981). Extracted feature: regulatory; record /note: "put. promoter for T3 RNA polymerase".

entries.name: T7 promoter (for T7 RNA polymerase, phi10 class)
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: Promoter for bacteriophage T7 RNA polymerase, annotated as a clean range in a SnapGene-style synthetic-construct record (PX994934). The extracted 19-mer is additionally confirmed present verbatim in the canonical pET28a vector record (PP098726.1). Extracted feature: regulatory; record /note: "promoter for bacteriophage T7 RNA polymerase; T7 promoter". Cross-confirmed: the extracted sequence is present verbatim in PP098726.1 at 4984..5002 (https://eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/entrez/eutils/efetch.fcgi?db=nuccore&id=PP098726.1&rettype=gb&retmode=text).

entries.name: tac promoter (trp/lacUV5 hybrid)
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: tac promoter, a strong hybrid of the trp -35 and lacUV5 -10 elements, annotated as a clean range in a cloning-vector record (MT321292, pMBP-OsD27deltaTP). Extracted feature: regulatory; record /note: "strong E. coli promoter; hybrid between the trp and lac UV5 promoters; tac promoter".

entries.name: trc promoter (trp/lacUV5 hybrid)
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: trc promoter, a strong hybrid of the trp and lacUV5 promoters (one bp spacing differs from tac), annotated as a clean range in a synthetic-construct record (KX682239, pGC014.mod). Extracted feature: regulatory; record /note: "hybrid between the trp and lac UV5 promoters; strong E. coli promoter; trc promoter".

entries.name: CMV enhancer (human cytomegalovirus immediate-early)
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: CMV immediate-early enhancer; pairs with the CMV promoter in mammalian expression vectors. Extracted feature: regulatory; record /note: "CMV enhancer".

entries.name: lac operator (O1, lacI/LacI binding site)
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: lac operator (the LacI repressor binding site that gates the lac/T7lac/tac promoters), annotated as a clean coordinate range in a SnapGene-style synthetic-construct record (PX994934). Extracted feature: misc_feature; record /note: "The lac repressor binds to the lac operator to inhibit transcription in E. coli. This inhibition can be relieved by adding lactose or isopropyl-beta-D-thiogalactopyranoside (IPTG).; lac operator; lac repressor encoded by lacI".

entries.name: Shine-Dalgarno sequence (E. coli, pBR322 rop 5'UTR)
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: Shine-Dalgarno ribosome-binding sequence extracted from a real E. coli gene 5'UTR in the pBR322 record (J01749), not recited. Extracted feature: regulatory; record /note: "Shine-Dalgarno sequence".

entries.name: SV40 late polyA signal
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: SV40 late mRNA polyadenylation signal (the hexamer signal), from the primary SV40 genome record (J02400). Extracted feature: regulatory; record /note: "late mRNA polyadenyation signal; 0.17 [23],[68], [120]".

entries.name: lambda tL3 terminator (from phage lambda)
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: Phage lambda tL3 transcription terminator, annotated as a clean range in a synthetic-construct record (OQ295986). Extracted feature: regulatory; record /note: "Lambda tL3 terminator, transcription terminator tL3 from phage lambda".

entries.name: rrnB T1 terminator (E. coli)
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: E. coli rrnB T1 transcription terminator, annotated as a clean range with an explicit note in a GenBank vector record (pSEVA251 derivative). Extracted feature: regulatory; record /note: "rrnB T1 terminator".

entries.name: T7 terminator (T-phi, from phage T7)
entries.source: NCBI GenBank (nuccore), extracted by feature coordinates
entries.note: T7 (T-phi) transcription terminator, annotated as a clean range in a synthetic plasmid record (OZ375372, pcrRNA3gfplex). This is the standard downstream terminator of pET-series T7 expression cassettes. Extracted feature: regulatory; record /note: "T7 terminator".
